name: harness-init
description: One-time, explicitly-invoked project bootstrap that sets up or upgrades an agentic development harness: a thin CLAUDE.md that @imports coding guidelines, a PRD -> milestone-branch -> per-slice TDD -> review -> handoff dev cycle, an authoritative docs/glossary.md, and an ADR template (the PRD template is owned by the /prd skill). Idempotent — detects and merges with existing files.
